title: The UK's top UFO expert Nick Pope has died at the age of 60
description: The former Ministry of Defence (MoD) official - who was at the helm of what was dubbed Britain's "UFO Desk" for three years from 1991 to 1994 - passed away a short time after being diagnosed with Stage 4 oesophageal cancer.

title: Donald Trump Named 'Only One Who Can Reveal Truth' as Congressman Claims Vast UFO Cover-up Inside US System
description: Congressman Tim Burchett suggests that Donald Trump is the only figure capable of revealing the truth about UFOs, alleging a deep government cover-up.

title: Artemis II Warning: UFO Experts Fear Astronauts Could Bring Aliens Back From Moon
description: NASA's Artemis II mission concludes today as the Orion capsule splashes down after a record-breaking lunar far side flyby. While astronauts Reid Wiseman and Victor Glover prepare for a 24,000 mph re-entry, UFO experts like Robert Pulme warn of potential alien DNA. Read the full fact-check on the 2026 moon...

title: Nearly a century of wondering: The American UFO saga, in reality and in fiction
UFO experts fear Artemis II astronauts could bring back aliens from dark side of moon
description: Out of this world beings could be making a grand entrance to Earth when the Artemis II capsule lands with a bang as the astronauts prepare for 'fireball' return
